name: MEOKCLAW
description: Sovereign dual-brain AI orchestration agent. Routes queries through left (API) and right (local) hemispheres with automatic fallback, neural guardrails, and BFT consensus. Capable of single inference, multi-model council debate, and nested QuantMan reasoning.

skills.name: Dual-Brain Inference
skills.description: Route a query through the optimal AI hemisphere with automatic fallback across OpenRouter, Ollama, and local models. Includes guardrails and cost tracking.
examples: Explain quantum computing in simple terms
Refactor this Python function for performance

skills.name: Byzantine Council
skills.description: Convene 3–7 independent AI models to debate a question and reach BFT consensus. Returns the consensus answer, confidence score, and minority reports.
examples: Is this code vulnerable to SQL injection?
What are the ethical implications of this policy?

skills.name: QuantMan Nested Reasoning
skills.description: Execute nested dual-brain reasoning with left/right hemisphere meshes, SOV3 mediation, and HY3 convergence. Best for complex multi-step reasoning tasks.
examples: Analyze the strategic trade-offs of three cloud providers for a fintech startup
Evaluate this research paper's methodology and suggest improvements

skills.name: Neural Guardrails Check
skills.description: Check text for prompt injection, PII leakage, content policy violations, and encoding attacks. Returns violations, severity, and cleaned text.
examples: Check this user message for injection attacks
Redact any PII from this transcript
